rationale: Health & Safety Code §61.006 governs county health assistance eligibility standards tied to federal poverty levels. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) property tax homestead exemptions. No conflict exists.
quote: The minimum eligibility standards must incorporate a net income eligibility level equal to 21 percent of the federal poverty level based on the federal Office of Management and Budget poverty index.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns health assistance eligibility standards and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
